욥기 36:2.content: “Bear with me a little, and I will show you; for I still have something to say on God’s behalf.

욥기 36:3.content: I will get my knowledge from afar, and will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.

욥기 36:4.content: For truly my words are not false. One who is perfect in knowledge is with you.

욥기 36:5.content: “Behold, God is mighty, and doesn’t despise anyone. He is mighty in strength of understanding.

욥기 36:6.content: He doesn’t preserve the life of the wicked, but gives justice to the afflicted.

욥기 36:7.content: He doesn’t withdraw his eyes from the righteous, but with kings on the throne, he sets them forever, and they are exalted.

욥기 36:8.content: If they are bound in fetters, and are taken in the cords of afflictions,

욥기 36:9.content: then he shows them their work, and their transgressions, that they have behaved themselves proudly.

욥기 36:10.content: He also opens their ears to instruction, and commands that they return from iniquity.

욥기 36:11.content: If they listen and serve him, they will spend their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasures.

욥기 36:12.content: But if they don’t listen, they will perish by the sword; they will die without knowledge.

욥기 36:13.content: “But those who are godless in heart lay up anger. They don’t cry for help when he binds them.

욥기 36:14.content: They die in youth. Their life perishes among the unclean.

욥기 36:15.content: He delivers the afflicted by their affliction, and opens their ear in oppression.

욥기 36:16.content: Yes, he would have allured you out of distress, into a wide place, where there is no restriction. That which is set on your table would be full of fatness.

욥기 36:17.content: “But you are full of the judgment of the wicked. Judgment and justice take hold of you.

욥기 36:18.content: Don’t let riches entice you to wrath, neither let the great size of a bribe turn you aside.

욥기 36:19.content: Would your wealth sustain you in distress, or all the might of your strength?

욥기 36:20.content: Don’t desire the night, when people are cut off in their place.

욥기 36:21.content: Take heed, don’t regard iniquity; for you have chosen this rather than affliction.

욥기 36:22.content: Behold, God is exalted in his power. Who is a teacher like him?

욥기 36:23.content: Who has prescribed his way for him? Or who can say, ‘You have committed unrighteousness?’

욥기 36:24.content: “Remember that you magnify his work, about which men have sung.

욥기 36:25.content: All men have looked on it. Man sees it afar off.

욥기 36:26.content: Behold, God is great, and we don’t know him. The number of his years is unsearchable.

욥기 36:27.content: For he draws up the drops of water, which distill in rain from his vapor,

욥기 36:28.content: which the skies pour down and which drop on man abundantly.

욥기 36:29.content: Yes, can any understand the spreading of the clouds, and the thunderings of his pavilion?

욥기 36:30.content: Behold, he spreads his light around him. He covers the bottom of the sea.

욥기 36:31.content: For by these he judges the people. He gives food in abundance.

욥기 36:32.content: He covers his hands with the lightning, and commands it to strike the mark.

욥기 36:33.content: Its noise tells about him, and the livestock also concerning the storm that comes up.
